# Unified Nexus — Landing Page Design Guide

> A student-led IT club. Retro-minimalist. Paper-toned. Unforgettable.

---

## 1. Project Overview

**Client:** Unified Nexus — Student-Led IT Club  
**Deliverable:** Single-Page Application (SPA) Landing Page  
**Stack:** HTML · CSS · Vanilla JS · PHP (backend) · Three.js · GSAP · ScrollTrigger  
**Philosophy:** Old-school editorial minimalism. The kind of thing that feels like it was typeset on a press, not generated by an algorithm.

---

## 2. Aesthetic Direction

### Core Identity

> _"A broadsheet meets a circuit board. Ink on paper. Clean. Deliberate. Alive."_

The entire visual language should evoke **analogue precision** — the feeling of a well-designed 1970s technical journal or a Bauhaus poster translated into digital form. Not sterile. Not clinical. Warm, papery, textured — but structured and professional.

**Forbidden aesthetics (strictly avoid):**

- Purple/blue AI gradients
- Glowing neon chips or circuit-board aesthetics
- Glassmorphism / frosted panels
- Rounded pill buttons
- San-serif tech fonts (Inter, Roboto, Space Grotesk, Plus Jakarta)
- Confetti, particles that feel like screensavers
- Generic hero stock imagery

---

## 3. Color Palette

Use CSS custom properties everywhere. No hardcoded values in components.

```css
:root {
  /* Backgrounds */
  --color-bg-dark: #0d0d0b; /* Loading screen — near-black, warm tinted */
  --color-bg-base: #f5f0e8; /* Main page — aged paper */
  --color-bg-surface: #ede8dc; /* Cards, elevated panels */
  --color-bg-ink: #1a1916; /* Deep ink black for headings */

  /* Ink / Text */
  --color-ink-primary: #1a1916; /* Primary text */
  --color-ink-secondary: #4a4640; /* Secondary / body */
  --color-ink-muted: #8a837a; /* Labels, captions */
  --color-ink-ghost: #c8c0b4; /* Borders, dividers */

  /* Accents (muted, never loud) */
  --color-accent-rust: #8b4e35; /* Primary accent — dark terracotta */
  --color-accent-olive: #5a5e35; /* Secondary accent — muted olive */
  --color-accent-stone: #7a7060; /* Tertiary accent — warm stone */

  /* Loading screen specific */
  --color-loader-bg: #0d0d0b;
  --color-loader-bar: #f5f0e8;
  --color-loader-text: #f5f0e8;
}
```

**Usage rules:**

- Background is always warm paper (`--color-bg-base`) — never pure white
- All borders use `--color-ink-ghost` at low opacity
- Accent colours appear sparingly — one element per section, maximum
- Dark mode is exclusively the loading screen; main content stays paper-toned

---

## 4. Typography

### Type Scale

| Role           | Font                   | Weight  | Notes                                                |
| -------------- | ---------------------- | ------- | ---------------------------------------------------- |
| Display / Hero | **Playfair Display**   | 700–900 | Serif. Regal. Used for section titles, hero headline |
| Subheadings    | **Cormorant Garamond** | 500–600 | Light serif. Elegant. Used for sub-labels            |
| Body / UI      | **Libre Baskerville**  | 400     | Readable serif for paragraphs                        |
| Mono / Code    | **IBM Plex Mono**      | 400     | Tags, labels, technical callouts                     |
| Accent Label   | **Cinzel**             | 400     | Sparing use. Club name in loading screen.            |

### Type Rules

- **Never** set body text smaller than `16px` / `1rem`
- Hero headline: `clamp(3.5rem, 8vw, 8rem)` — responsive and dramatic
- Line height for body: `1.75`
- Letter spacing for labels (mono): `0.12em`
- All-caps is permitted only on labels and navigation items — never on body copy
- Paragraph max-width: `68ch` for readability

```css
:root {
  --font-display: "Playfair Display", Georgia, serif;
  --font-sub: "Cormorant Garamond", "Book Antiqua", serif;
  --font-body: "Libre Baskerville", "Georgia", serif;
  --font-mono: "IBM Plex Mono", "Courier New", monospace;
  --font-label: "Cinzel", "Palatino", serif;
}
```

---

## 5. Loading Screen

### Behaviour Specification

1. **Minimum duration:** Always display for at least **1,500ms** regardless of actual load state. Use `Promise.all([contentReady, minDelay])` pattern.
2. **Progress bar:** Animates from `0%` to `100%` over the 1,500ms window — independent of real network load, always completes gracefully.
3. **Loaded state:** When both the timer and content are ready, display `"Loaded."` text below the bar (fade in, 300ms).
4. **Auto-trigger threshold:** If **no user interaction** occurs within **1,500ms** after "Loaded" state, the gate animation fires automatically.
5. **User interaction triggers:** `mousemove`, `mousedown`, `keydown`, `touchstart`, `scroll` — any of these during or after the loaded state trigger the gate immediately.

### Visual Design

```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                                              │
│                                              │
│           [ UNIFIED NEXUS LOGO ]             │
│         UNIFIED NEXUS  (Cinzel, spaced)      │
│         IT Student Club  (mono, muted)       │
│                                              │
│    ─────────────────────────────────────     │
│    [████████████████░░░░░░░░░░░░]  68%       │
│              Loading...  →  Loaded.          │
│                                              │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

- Background: `#0d0d0b` with a very subtle paper noise texture overlay
- Logo: SVG with dual-half design (left half / right half) to enable the split animation
- The logo SVG must be authored as two `<g>` groups (`#logo-left`, `#logo-right`) for GSAP splitting
- Progress bar: thin `2px` track, paper-coloured fill, no border-radius (flat, ruled-line aesthetic)
- Font colours on loader: `rgba(245, 240, 232, 0.9)` (paper-white)

### Gate Animation

**Trigger:** user event OR auto-trigger timer.

```
Phase 1 (0–200ms):   Logo halves split apart — left half slides left, right slides right
Phase 2 (0–600ms):   Left panel slides off screen to the left (ease-in-out cubic)
Phase 3 (0–600ms):   Right panel slides off screen to the right (ease-in-out cubic)
Phase 4 (300–900ms): Hero section fades up from below (translateY 40px → 0, opacity 0 → 1)
Phase 5 (600ms+):    Loading screen is removed from DOM / set display:none
```

- Easing: `cubic-bezier(0.76, 0, 0.24, 1)` (smooth, editorial — not bouncy)
- The loader is split into two `<div>` halves using `clip-path` or `overflow:hidden` — not CSS grid
- Use GSAP `timeline()` for precise sequencing

---

## 6. Layout System

### Grid

```css
:root {
  --grid-cols: 12;
  --grid-gutter: clamp(1rem, 2.5vw, 2rem);
  --grid-margin: clamp(1.5rem, 5vw, 6rem);
  --max-width: 1440px;
}
```

- All sections use the same 12-column grid
- Asymmetric column spans are encouraged (e.g. `col 1–7` for text, `col 8–12` for image)
- Sections bleed edge-to-edge; content respects margin
- **No full-bleed section backgrounds** — use ruled-line borders between sections instead

### Spacing Scale (8pt base)

```css
--space-1: 0.5rem; /*  8px */
--space-2: 1rem; /* 16px */
--space-3: 1.5rem; /* 24px */
--space-4: 2rem; /* 32px */
--space-6: 3rem; /* 48px */
--space-8: 4rem; /* 64px */
--space-12: 6rem; /* 96px */
--space-16: 8rem; /* 128px */
```

- Section vertical padding: `var(--space-16)` top and bottom
- Never use arbitrary pixel values — always use the scale

---

## 7. Motion & Animation System

### Principles

- Every element should have **at least one** animation state (hover, scroll-in, or initial reveal)
- No animation should feel accidental — each one must serve the design
- Default easing: `cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94)` (smooth ease-out)
- Gate easing: `cubic-bezier(0.76, 0, 0.24, 1)` (cinematic)
- Duration scale: `150ms` (micro) · `300ms` (UI) · `600ms` (layout) · `900ms–1200ms` (reveal)

### Scroll Animations (GSAP ScrollTrigger)

| Element          | Animation                                             |
| ---------------- | ----------------------------------------------------- |
| Section headings | Slide up `40px` + fade in, staggered per word         |
| Body paragraphs  | Fade in, slight translateY, triggered at 80% viewport |
| Images           | Reveal via clip-path wipe (left → right)              |
| Ruled dividers   | Width grows from `0%` to `100%` on scroll entry       |
| Cards / panels   | Stagger fade-up with `0.1s` offset per card           |

### Parallax Rules

- Hero background element: moves at `0.3×` scroll speed
- Section imagery: `0.15×` offset (subtle, not disorienting)
- Decorative typographic elements: `0.5×` (more movement, adds depth)
- Use CSS `will-change: transform` on parallax elements only

### Hover States

| Element          | Hover Effect                                                        |
| ---------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Navigation links | Underline draws in from left (CSS `::after`, `scaleX` transition)   |
| Buttons          | Background fill slides in from bottom (clip-path or pseudo-element) |
| Cards            | Subtle `translateY(-4px)` + box shadow deepens                      |
| Images           | `scale(1.02)` with `overflow:hidden` on parent (no layout shift)    |
| Ruled borders    | Colour shifts from ghost to ink                                     |

### Cursor

- Custom cursor: `24px` circle, `--color-ink-primary`, `mix-blend-mode: multiply`
- On hover over interactive elements: cursor expands to `40px`, changes to hollow ring
- Implementation: DOM element tracked with `mousemove` + `lerp` smoothing (not CSS cursor)

---

## 8. Three.js Usage

Three.js should be used for **atmospheric, ambient 3D elements** — not centrepiece spectacles. The renders should feel like texture, not feature.

### Recommended Usages

| Location              | Three.js Element        | Description                                                          |
| --------------------- | ----------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Hero background       | Rotating wireframe mesh | Low-poly icosahedron or geodesic dome, paper-white wireframe on dark |
| About section         | Floating particle field | Slow-drifting dots, very low density, monochrome                     |
| Skills / tech section | 3D text extrusion       | Club name or tagline as extruded geometry, animated slow rotation    |
| Contact section       | Abstract ribbon / cloth | Slow cloth simulation or ribbon, paper-coloured                      |

### Rendering Rules

- **Always** use `alpha: true` canvas background so the paper texture shows through
- Geometry colours: match `--color-ink-ghost` or `--color-bg-surface`
- No bright lights — use `AmbientLight` at low intensity + single `DirectionalLight`
- Frame rate: cap at 30fps for ambient elements (use `clock.getDelta()` throttle)
- Canvas `pointer-events: none` — never interfere with page interaction

---

## 9. Texture & Surface Details

- **Paper grain overlay:** A semi-transparent SVG noise filter or PNG texture tile over all backgrounds. Opacity: `3–6%`. Adds tactile quality without visual noise.
- **Ruled lines:** `1px` horizontal rules at `--color-ink-ghost` used as section dividers, list separators, and decorative elements
- **Print registration marks:** Small `+` crosshair marks at page corners as decorative detail (purely aesthetic, `position: fixed`)
- **Page number / folio:** Bottom-right corner, monospaced, very small (`0.75rem`), shows scroll progress as `01 / 06` style counter
- **Stamp elements:** Occasional circular stamp-like callouts (think rubber stamp aesthetic) for labels like `"EST. 2024"` or `"OPEN SOURCE"`

---

## 10. Component Patterns

### Navigation

- Single-line, full-width, top of page
- Left: wordmark `UNIFIED NEXUS` in Cinzel, letter-spaced
- Right: navigation items in Libre Baskerville, small-caps
- Bottom border: `1px` ruled line
- Sticky on scroll; background becomes `rgba(245,240,232,0.96)` with `backdrop-filter: blur(4px)`
- No hamburger menus — use a minimal text-only drawer on mobile

### Hero Section

- Asymmetric: headline occupies cols 1–8, media cols 9–12
- Headline: Playfair Display, `clamp(3.5rem, 8vw, 8rem)`, tight leading (`1.05`)
- Sub-label above headline: IBM Plex Mono, `0.85rem`, all-caps, `--color-accent-rust`
- CTA: Text-only button, ink colour, underline animation. No pill/rounded shapes.

### Cards / Members

- Flat, paper surface (`--color-bg-surface`)
- `1px` solid border `--color-ink-ghost`
- No border-radius (or max `2px` — nearly square corners)
- Image: greyscale by default, `filter: grayscale(100%)`, desaturates to full colour on hover

### Buttons

```css
.btn-primary {
  background: transparent;
  border: 1.5px solid var(--color-ink-primary);
  color: var(--color-ink-primary);
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  padding: 0.75rem 2rem;
  border-radius: 0;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  transition: color 300ms ease;
}
/* Fill slides in from bottom on hover */
.btn-primary::before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background: var(--color-ink-primary);
  transform: translateY(100%);
  transition: transform 300ms cubic-bezier(0.76, 0, 0.24, 1);
}
.btn-primary:hover {
  color: var(--color-bg-base);
}
.btn-primary:hover::before {
  transform: translateY(0);
}
```

---

## 11. Responsive Behaviour

| Breakpoint       | Layout Change                                                              |
| ---------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `< 480px`        | Single column. Hero headline `clamp(2.5rem, 10vw, 3.5rem)`. Nav collapses. |
| `480px – 768px`  | 4-column grid. Some sections stack.                                        |
| `768px – 1024px` | 8-column grid. Most sections retain asymmetry.                             |
| `> 1024px`       | Full 12-column. All sections as designed.                                  |

- Three.js canvases hidden on mobile (replaced with static SVG treatment) for performance
- Custom cursor disabled on touch devices
- Parallax disabled on `prefers-reduced-motion` media query
- All GSAP animations respect `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce`

---

## 12. PHP Backend Notes

- Backend serves API endpoints only — no server-side HTML rendering
- Suggested endpoints: `/api/members.php`, `/api/events.php`, `/api/contact.php`
- All responses: `Content-Type: application/json`
- CORS headers required for SPA fetch calls
- Contact form: validate server-side, sanitise all inputs, return `{success: bool, message: string}`

---

## 13. Performance Targets

| Metric                   | Target                                                     |
| ------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------- |
| First Contentful Paint   | `< 1.2s` (loading screen masks this gracefully)            |
| Largest Contentful Paint | `< 2.5s`                                                   |
| Total Blocking Time      | `< 200ms`                                                  |
| Cumulative Layout Shift  | `< 0.05`                                                   |
| Three.js bundle          | Load deferred, after loading screen completes              |
| Custom fonts             | `font-display: swap`, preloaded via `<link rel="preload">` |

---

## 14. File & Folder Structure

```
unified-nexus/
├── index.html
├── assets/
│   ├── css/
│   │   ├── main.css          # Variables, reset, base
│   │   ├── loader.css        # Loading screen
│   │   ├── components.css    # Reusable components
│   │   └── sections.css      # Page sections
│   ├── js/
│   │   ├── loader.js         # Loading screen logic
│   │   ├── animations.js     # GSAP / ScrollTrigger
│   │   ├── three-scene.js    # Three.js setup
│   │   ├── cursor.js         # Custom cursor
│   │   └── main.js           # Init / orchestration
│   ├── fonts/                # Self-hosted font files
│   ├── images/               # Optimised WebP assets
│   └── textures/             # Paper grain, noise textures
├── api/
│   ├── members.php
│   ├── events.php
│   └── contact.php
└── DESIGN_GUIDE.md
```

---

## 15. Quick Reference Checklist

Before shipping any section, verify:

- [ ] Uses only palette variables — no hardcoded colours
- [ ] Typography follows the type scale
- [ ] Every interactive element has a hover state
- [ ] Every section has a scroll-triggered entrance animation
- [ ] No element is fully static — at minimum a subtle CSS transition exists
- [ ] Images are greyscale by default
- [ ] Spacing uses the 8pt scale variables
- [ ] `prefers-reduced-motion` is respected
- [ ] Three.js canvas is `pointer-events: none`
- [ ] Loading screen enforces 1,500ms minimum
- [ ] Gate animation uses split-panel curtain effect
- [ ] Auto-trigger fires after 1,500ms of post-load inactivity

---

_Document version 1.0 — Unified Nexus Design System_
